title: Reflection Cinematic Depth-of-Field (id 346, value=2 vs default 1.4)
goal: Movements/Reflection Transition A/B carry a Cinematic > Depth of Field id=346 value=2 (vs default 1.3999999). Decode Motion's Cinematic DoF blur semantics and how it interacts with the Focus Point (id 348). Likely modulates the panel body's blur intensity based on depth/focus distance. Structural: fold-rig scenes only (already detectable per T-q50a7f2e6). DoD: measurable Reflection improvement above 14.23 with 0 regressions. Note: the OTHER perspective-relevant slugs (Color_Planes) do NOT carry a non-default DoF, so this is Reflection-shape-narrow.
